Class GenericSort

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.sort.AbstractSort
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.SortImpl
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.GenericSort
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasOrigin, Named, Sort
public final class GenericSort extends SortImpl
Sort used for generic taclets Within an SVInstantiations-object a generic sort is instantiated by a concrete sort, which has to be a subsort of the instantiations of the supersorts of this sort

  • Constructor Details

    • GenericSort

      public GenericSort(Name name, ImmutableSet<Sort> ext, ImmutableSet<Sort> oneOf, String documentation, String origin) throws GenericSupersortException
      creates a generic sort
      Parameters:
      ext - supersorts of this sort, which have to be either concrete sorts or plain generic sorts (i.e. not collection sorts of generic sorts)
      Throws:
      GenericSupersortException

    • GenericSort

      public GenericSort(Name name, ImmutableSet<Sort> ext, ImmutableSet<Sort> oneOf) throws GenericSupersortException
      Throws:
      GenericSupersortException

    • GenericSort

      public GenericSort(Name name)

  • Method Details

    • getOneOf

      public ImmutableSet<Sort> getOneOf()
      Returns:
      possible instantiations

    • isPossibleInstantiation

      public boolean isPossibleInstantiation(Sort p_s)
      Returns:
      true if "p_s" is a possible instantiation of this sort. This method does not check the instantiations of other generic sorts, i.e. the return value true is possible even if "p_s" is not a valid instantiation. Use "GenericSortInstantiations" instead

    • containsGenericSort

      public boolean containsGenericSort()
      Description copied from interface: Sort
      Whether this sort is or contains an uninstantiated generic sort.
      Specified by:
      containsGenericSort in interface Sort
      Overrides:
      containsGenericSort in class SortImpl
